Uses of Class
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.supplemental.TxnSupplementalLineBase

Packages that use TxnSupplementalLineBase
Package
Description
nonprofitbookkeeping.model
Contains core domain and transfer models.
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.supplemental
Provides model types for supplemental bookkeeping data.
nonprofitbookkeeping.persistence.supplemental
Provides persistence support for supplemental data.
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.javafx.supplemental
Provides JavaFX editors for supplemental data.
